details.quote: online identifiers such as [cookie data](https://www.spotify.com/legal/cookies-policy/) and IP addresses

mentions_legales.label: Dénomination sociale (nom/raison sociale)
mentions_legales.quote: Spotify USA Inc. is the data controller of personal data processed under this Policy.

mentions_legales.label: Adresse de l'établissement / siège social
mentions_legales.quote: Spotify USA Inc., 150 Greenwich Street, Floor 62, New York, NY 10007, USA

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Identité du Responsable de Traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Spotify USA Inc. is the data controller of personal data processed under this Policy.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Coordonnées du DPO
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: contact our Data Protection Officer any one of these ways: * Email us at privacy@spotify.com * write to us at: Spotify USA Inc., 150 Greenwich Street, Floor 62, New York, NY 10007, USA, Attn: Data Protection Officer

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Types de données collectées + raison
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: | **Categories** | **Description** | | User Data | Personal data that we need to create your Spotify account and that enables you to use the Spotify Service. The type of data collected and used depends on the type of Service Option you have. It also depends on how you create your account, the country you are in, and if you use third party services to sign in. This may include your: * display name * email address * password * phone number * date of birth * gender * street address (see further details below) * country * university/college (for Spotify Premium Student) * estimated or confirmed age from an Age Check by a third party provider

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Base légale du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: The table below sets out: * our purpose for processing your personal data * categories of personal data which we use for each purpose.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Caractère obligatoire/facultatif + conséquences
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Please note there are situations where Spotify is unable to delete your data, for example when: * it’s still necessary to process the data for the purpose we collected it for * we have an overriding interest in continuing to process the data, for example where we need the data to protect our services from fraud * Spotify has a legal obligation to keep the data, or * Spotify needs the data to establish, exercise or defend legal claims.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Durée de conservation des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We keep your personal data only as long as necessary to provide you with the Spotify Service and for Spotify’s legitimate and essential business purposes, such as: * maintaining the performance of the Spotify Service * making data-driven business decisions about new features and offerings * complying with our legal obligations * resolving disputes

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Destinataires des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: | **Categories of recipients** | **Categories of data** | **Reason for disclosing** | | --- | --- | --- | | Service providers | * User Data * Street Address Data * Usage Data * Voice Data * Message Data * Payment and Purchase Data * Survey and Research Data * Age Check Data | So they can provide their services to Spotify.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Prise de décision automatisée
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Spotify does not carry out this type of automated decision making in the Spotify Service.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Sécurité des données (art. 32 RGPD)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We put in place appropriate technical and organizational measures to help protect the security of your personal data. However, be aware that no system is ever completely secure. We have put various safeguards in place to guard against unauthorized access and unnecessary retention of personal data in our systems. These include pseudonymization, encryption, access, and retention policies.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Collecte indirecte : catégories concernées
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We receive some of the data mentioned above from third parties. The below table describes the categories of those third parties.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Collecte indirecte : source des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: | **Categories of third parties** | **Description** | **Data categories** | | --- | --- | --- | | Authentication partners | If you register for or log into the Spotify Service using another service, that service will send your information to us. This information helps create your account with us. | User Data |

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'introduire une plainte (CNIL)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: **Appeals process** If your request is denied you may have the right to appeal the denial in accordance with the instructions provided to you when the denial was made.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit de rectification
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: **Correction** | **Request that we amend or update your personal data where it’s inaccurate.** | You can edit your User Data under ‘Edit profile’ in your account or by [contacting us](#_l8q1yc21jzme).

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'accès
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: **Know/Access** | **Request to know and access the personal data we process about you.** | To request a copy of your personal data from Spotify, either: * use the ‘Download your data’ tool on your [Account Privacy](https://www.spotify.com/account/privacy/) page, or * [contact us](#_l8q1yc21jzme)

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à l'effacement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: **Deletion** | **Request that we delete certain of your personal data.** | There are several ways you can delete personal data from Spotify: * to remove audio content you have saved, select the relevant content and choose to remove it. For example you can remove a track from your playlist or remove an artist you’ve saved to your library * to request deletion of your account data from Spotify and close your account, follow the steps on our [support page](https://support.spotify.com/article/close-account/). This data includes your User Data, Usage Data and other data listed in [Section 3 ‘Personal data we collect about you](#_djeb6mmnhu1p)’

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la limitation du traitement
Droit à la portabilité
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: **Data portability** | **Request a copy of your personal data in electronic format and the right to transmit that personal data for use in another party’s service.** | For information about how to exercise the right to portability, see ‘Know/Access’ above.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'opposition
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: **Opt-out of tailored advertising** | **Request to opt out of the processing of your personal data for tailored advertising.** | You can exercise your right to opt out through the ‘[Tailored Ads](https://www.spotify.com/account/privacy/)’ setting.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Date de dernière mise à jour de la politique

cookies.label: Présence d'une politique cookies
cookies.quote: online identifiers such as [cookie data](https://www.spotify.com/legal/cookies-policy/) and IP addresses

cookies.label: Retrait du consentement simple et à tout moment
Information sur le Responsable de Traitement
cookies.quote: Spotify USA Inc. is the data controller of personal data processed under this Policy.

cookies.label: Finalité des cookies (claire et complète)
cookies.quote: To deliver content, advertising and recommendations that are relevant to you

cookies.label: Liste des partenaires à jour
cookies.quote: | **Categories of recipients** | **Categories of data** | **Reason for disclosing** | | --- | --- | --- | | Advertising partners | * User Data * Usage Data | So Spotify and our advertising partners can deliver more relevant advertising to you on the Spotify Service and online, and help measure the effectiveness of ads.

cookies.label: Détail des finalités (2e niveau)
cookies.quote: For example: * to help us develop and improve our personalized recommendations * to help analyze how our users react to a particular new feature and see whether we should make any changes * so we can build AI features such as AI DJ and AI playlist

cookies.label: Détail des types de cookies déposés
cookies.quote: online identifiers such as [cookie data](https://www.spotify.com/legal/cookies-policy/) and IP addresses

cookies.label: Outil de mesure d'audience mentionné
cookies.quote: We also work with technical service partners who help us protect user accounts.

cookies.label: Consentement requis pour l'outil statistique
cookies.quote: If you do not have an account or are not logged in, you can also opt-out by clicking the ['Your Privacy Choices'](https://www.spotify.com/us/legal/privacy-policy/#optanon-toggle-info-display) link at the footer of our website.

transferts_hors_ue.label: Existence de transferts hors UE + destinataires
transferts_hors_ue.quote: Because of the global nature of our business, Spotify transfers personal data internationally with Spotify group companies, subcontractors and partners when carrying out the activities described in this Policy.

transferts_hors_ue.label: Stockage cloud hors UE + localisation serveurs

identite.quote:
* display name
* email address
* password
* phone number
* date of birth
* gender
* street address (see further details below)
* country
* university/college (for Spotify Premium Student)
* estimated or confirmed age from an Age Check by a third party provider
identite.purpose: Création et gestion du compte utilisateur, vérification d'éligibilité, personnalisation du service.

contact.quote:
* email address
* phone number
* street address (see further details below)
contact.purpose: Communication, support, livraison de biens ou services, facturation et administration fiscale.

compte_auth.purpose: Authentification et gestion du compte utilisateur.

paiement.quote:
* name
* date of birth
* payment method type (e.g. credit or debit card)
* if using a debit or credit card, the card type, expiry date and certain digits of your card number. Note: For security, Spotify never stores your full card number
* ZIP/postal code
* mobile phone number
* details of your purchase and payment history
paiement.purpose: Traitement des paiements, gestion des abonnements et prévention de la fraude.

localisation.quote:
* Your general (non-precise) location
Your general location includes country, region, state or city. We may learn this from technical data (e.g. your IP address, language setting of your device) or payment currency.
* Precise Location Data
Spotify will only use your precise location data with your permission. You can grant this access through the in-app pop-up and in your device settings.
localisation.purpose: Personnalisation des recommandations, publicité ciblée, respect des accords géographiques.

appareil_technique.quote:
* URL information
* online identifiers such as [cookie data](https://www.spotify.com/legal/cookies-policy/) and IP addresses
* information about the devices you use such as:
* device IDs
* network connection type (e.g. wifi, 4G, LTE, Bluetooth)
* provider
* network and device performance
* browser type
* language
* information enabling digital rights management
* operating system
* Spotify application version
* information which enables us to discover and connect with third party devices and applications.
appareil_technique.purpose: Fourniture du service, amélioration des fonctionnalités, sécurité et personnalisation.

usage_comportement.quote:
* information about your Spotify Service Option
* your actions with the Spotify Service (including date and time), such as:
* search queries
* streaming history
* playlists you create
* your library
* browsing history
* account settings
* interactions with other Spotify users
* prompts in AI powered features
* transcripts
* engagement with ads
* your use of third party services, devices and applications in connection with the Spotify Service
* inferences (i.e., our understanding) of your age, interests and preferences based on your usage of the Spotify Service
usage_comportement.purpose: Personnalisation des recommandations, amélioration du service, publicité ciblée.

contenus_utilisateur.quote:
* content you provide when participating in Spotify promotions, such as contests or sweepstakes
* content you post to any part of the Spotify Service. For example: images, audio, text, titles, descriptions, communications, and other types of content
contenus_utilisateur.purpose: Participation à des promotions, partage de contenu avec d'autres utilisateurs.

communications.quote:
* Message Data
Message data means text or other content you send directly to another user.

donnees_tiers.quote:
* We receive some of the data mentioned above from third parties. The below table describes the categories of those third parties.
* Authentication partners
* Third party applications, services and devices you connect to your Spotify account
* Technical service partners
* Payment partners and Merchants
* Advertising and marketing partners
* Acquired companies
donnees_tiers.purpose: Création de compte, intégration avec des services tiers, publicité ciblée, traitement des paiements.

mineurs.quote:
* If you are above the Age Limit but under the age of majority in your country (a "Minor"), you may use the Spotify Service only with the consent of your parent or legal guardian.
* We do not knowingly collect or use personal data from children under the applicable Age Limit outside of Managed Accounts or Spotify Kids.
mineurs.purpose: Respect des limites d'âge et protection des données des mineurs.

legal_bases.data: User Data, Street Address Data, Usage Data, Voice Data, Message Data, Payment and Purchase Data, Age Check Data
legal_bases.quote:
* To provide the Spotify Service.
For example, when we use your personal data to:
* set up an account for you
* personalize your account including your content recommendations, or
* provide the Spotify app when you download it onto your device,

legal_bases.data: Precise Location Data, Voice Data, Message Data, Tailored Advertising
legal_bases.quote:
* Spotify will only use your precise location data with your permission. You can grant this access through the in-app pop-up and in your device settings.
* To withdraw your consent, you can:
• adjust the relevant control on Spotify
• [contact us](#_l8q1yc21jzme)

legal_bases.data: User Data, Street Address Data, Usage Data, Voice Data, Message Data, Payment and Purchase Data, Survey and Research Data, Precise Location Data, Customer Service Data
legal_bases.quote:
* To comply with a legal obligation that we are subject to.
This might be:
* an obligation under the law of the country/region you are in
* Swedish law (because of our headquarters in Sweden), or
* EU law that applies to us

legal_bases.data: User Data, Street Address Data, Usage Data, Voice Data, Message Data, Payment and Purchase Data, Customer Service Data
legal_bases.quote:
* To keep the Spotify Service secure and to detect and prevent fraud.
For example, when we analyze Usage Data to check for fraudulent use of the Spotify Service.

legal_bases.data: User Data, Usage Data, Voice Data, Payment and Purchase Data
legal_bases.quote:
* To fulfill contractual obligations with third parties.
For example, when we provide pseudonymized data about our users’ listening because we have an agreement with a Spotify rightsholder to do so.

transfers.quote: * Because of the global nature of our business, Spotify transfers personal data internationally with Spotify group companies, subcontractors and partners when carrying out the activities described in this Policy.
